description: Make @type a noted scoping concern, not an out-of-band attribute table. define_scope notes each @type by minting TypeName(module,name,arity) and holding its body AST -- the same cheap note-what-is-here that already mints fn and module ids. Add NamespaceSymbol::Type(TypeName); add reference_type(module,name,arity) mirroring reference_function for use-site refs like Foo.t. Retain top-level @type the way modules already do: finish_code_index (source.rs:58) drops program.attrs while modules keep theirs (source.rs:492) -- make GLOBAL uniform. No resolution, no type-algebra here. Verify: namespace_test extended for Type; a @type becomes a referenceable identity with its body held.
title: Note type names: NamespaceSymbol::Type, reference_type, retain top-level @type
